variants.label: 完整 Hybrid
variants.description: 复用主实验的 lifecycle hybrid 多随机种子结果。

plots.description: Mean and std across the configured random seeds.

plots.description: Prediction error histogram for every configured seed.

plots.description: Train/validation loss curves for the configured seed runs.

variants.label: 去掉 xLSTM
variants.description: 仅保留 Transformer 路径，验证 xLSTM 的贡献。

variants.label: 去掉 Transformer

variants.label: 去掉 domain embedding
variants.description: 移除 source/chemistry/protocol 条件编码，验证多源域先验的贡献。

variants.label: 去掉 trajectory head
variants.description: 关闭未来 trajectory decoder，验证显式轨迹监督对 knee/EOL 的贡献。

plots.description: Aggregate mean/std metrics for the ablation variant.

plots.description: Prediction error histogram for each seed in the ablation variant.

plots.title: NASA no_trajectory_head training curves
plots.description: Train/validation loss for the ablation variant.

notes: Ablation summaries reuse the same fixed battery split and the same seed set as the main multi-seed experiment.
Delta is computed against full_hybrid using aggregate RMSE.

plots.title: NASA ablation overview
plots.description: Aggregate RMSE for each hybrid ablation variant.
